title: Don't ResolveName if image is fully specified
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

If the user specified a fully qualified image name, i.e. `docker://centos:centos`, then don't try to parse it, just let it try to be resolved as is.  The prior code failed the parsing due to two colons ':' in the  given name.

Addresses: #1117

comments.body: I did a different version of this.  We could just check for the defaultransport prefix and then skip this check.
@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL at my version of this. https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1120
